## This project does not accept external code contributions

Pull requests against this repository will be closed unread, regardless of
size or intent. See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md).

If you want to run a modified version of this addon (or the companion
scanner it talks to), please fork it and self-host your own copy instead -
everything is AGPLv3, so you're free to do that.

Bug reports are still welcome via Issues.
